distinguishing_features: True chanterelle: thick meaty ridges false gills. False chanterelle: thin blade-like gills true gills. Chanterelle: flesh-colored interior. False: watery fragile. Chanterelle: no smell or fruity. False: no distinctive smell.

Porcini: larger 5-30cm cap. Bitter: medium 5-20cm. Porcini: thick bulbous base with network pattern. Bitter: thinner base. Porcini: no immediate bruising. Bitter: immediate intense blue-green bruising. Porcini: pleasant smell. Bitter: unpleasant acrid smell. Taste test dangerous.
True morel: honeycomb pits. False morel: brain-like ridges. True: hollow top to bottom. False: chambered or cottony inside. True: margin free not attached. False: margin attached to sides.

Young puffball: uniform white inside no structure. Young death cap: internal ring and gills visible. Death cap: bulbous base with cup volva at ground. Puffball: simple attachment. Death cap: distinctive white cup at base.

Meadow mushroom: pink to dark brown gills as it ages. Death cap: white gills not changing color. Meadow: no cup at base. Death cap: distinctive white cup volva at base. Meadow: pleasant normal mushroom smell. Death cap: distinctive radish smell.

Honey mushroom: 2-6cm yellow-brown clustered on wood. Funeral bell: 1-3cm brown bell-shaped scattered. Honey: white flesh fragrant. Funeral bell: thin fragile dark flesh. Honey: distinctive ring on stem. Funeral bell: faint or no ring. Honey: must be cooked edible. Funeral bell: deadly amatoxins.

Orange milk cap: bright orange rings on cap. False milk cap: paler less distinctive rings. Orange: true orange milk when cut. False: pale or clear latex. Orange: pleasant fruity smell. False: no distinctive smell. Orange: crowded gills. False: distant gills.

Parasol: double ring on stem light brown scaly cap. Amanita: single ring white cap with warts. Parasol: free gills attached at point. Amanita: free gills without attachment. Parasol: no cup at base. Amanita: distinctive volva cup at base. Parasol: normal pleasant smell. Amanita: may have radish or no smell.
